title: Anterior versus Posterior Approach in Total Hip Arthroplasty: A Multicentre Randomised Trial
container-title: The New England Journal of Medicine
message.abstract: <jats:p>BACKGROUND: <jats:italic>Total hip arthroplasty</jats:italic> outcomes vary by surgical approach.</jats:p><jats:p>METHODS: We randomised 412 patients.</jats:p><jats:p>CONCLUSION: Anterior approach reduced 30-day complications.</jats:p>
